one_liner: Close is a sales CRM offering a broad REST API (leads, contacts, opportunities, activities) with API key and OAuth2 auth, gated behind paid plans, and already has an official MCP server.

auth_methods.notes: HTTP Basic auth with API key as username, empty password. Self-serve via Settings > Developer > API Keys.
Recommended for user-facing/third-party integrations; requires creating an OAuth app.

self_serve_notes: API access requires a paid Close CRM subscription; there is no free tier for developer/API access, though CRM has a free trial. Within a paid plan, API keys can be created immediately without additional approval.

api_surface.notes: Covers leads, contacts, opportunities, activities, custom fields, webhooks, event log; OpenAPI spec published (experimental).

main_blocker: Requires a paid Close plan to obtain API credentials; no free self-serve tier for developers.

evidence.supports: API key auth via HTTP Basic, self-serve creation in Settings > Developer > API Keys
REST API with broad resource coverage, OAuth2 and API key auth, OpenAPI spec
API access included with paid CRM plans, no permanent free tier

flags: No free tier for API access - requires paid plan
